value:
Thanks for reaching out! I understand how frustrating that must be—it's great that your AppleTV is working well on the wired connection, but I can see why you'd want to use your phone as a remote too. 

The issue you're running into is that Apple's Remote app requires your phone and AppleTV to be on the same network (WiFi or wired). Since your AppleTV is wired and your phone connects via WiFi, they're technically on different networks, which is why the remote can't discover it.

Here are a couple of options: you can connect your AppleTV to WiFi instead of wired (if that works for your setup), or if you need to keep it wired, you could try connecting your phone to the same WiFi network your AppleTV uses—many routers bridge wired and wireless devices on the same network, so this might actually work. If you'd like to troubleshoot further, let me know your router model and I can give you more specific guidance.
